subject: WM-0087 ready for review
body: Updated WM-0087 after review: Chrome Stable / Edge Stable Web gate tooling and demo-only browser evidence remain unchanged; required bench gate was rerun from temp artifact roots and passed full-suite with all entries OK, including m5-alpha-content-long-run 46.351 ms vs baseline 74.634 ms (-37.90%); web-shell e2e, taskctl validate, git diff --check and pnpm quality passed; threshold policy, baseline file and tracked M5 artifacts were not weakened or rewritten.
